title: PanasonicAero
description: [AI generated] Panasonic Avionics Corporation, commonly known as Panasonic Aero, is a US-based subsidiary of Panasonic Corporation specializing in in-flight entertainment and connectivity systems for commercial airlines. The company designs and supplies seatback screens, Wi-Fi connectivity, and cabin management solutions. Headquartered in Lake Forest, California, it serves major global airlines and operates within the aerospace and aviation technology industry.
